name: Double Agent
description: Competitive intelligence on agent-economy companies. Tracks 300+ x402 ecosystem companies via GitHub PR stream and publishes structured JSONL datasets for autonomous purchase via x402 USDC.

skills.name: x402 Ecosystem — Full Company Index
skills.description: Complete JSONL snapshot of all ~300 companies tracked in the x402 GitHub ecosystem PR stream. $2.00/download, weekly refresh.

skills.name: x402 Ecosystem — New This Week
skills.description: Incremental JSONL diff of companies first appearing in the x402 PR stream this week. $0.50/download, weekly refresh.

skills.name: x402 Ecosystem — Merged Only (vetted)
skills.description: Subset of ~214 companies whose x402 PRs have been merged and accepted. $1.00/download, weekly refresh.

skills.name: x402 Ecosystem — Raw (all statuses)
skills.description: Unfiltered JSONL including open, merged, closed, draft, and rejected PRs. ~302 entries. $1.50/download, weekly refresh.
